---
title: "Terumasa Tadano"
subtitle: "Group Leader, Spin Theory Group · National Institute for Materials Science (NIMS)"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/avatar.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 11em
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vo4EZggAAAAJ&hl=en"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/ttadano"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/terumasa-tadano-5b7506172/"
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:TADANO.Terumasa@nims.go.jp"
listing:
  - id: recent-news
    contents: "news/2*.qmd"
    type: table
    max-items: 5
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [date, title]
    date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Biography

Terumasa Tadano is a Group Leader of the Spin Theory Group at the National Institute
for Materials Science (NIMS), Japan. His research develops first-principles and
data-driven methods for predicting the thermal and transport properties of solids,
with emphasis on lattice anharmonicity, phonon transport, electron–phonon coupling,
and finite-temperature materials design. He is a principal developer of the
[ALAMODE](https://github.com/ttadano/alamode) software for anharmonic lattice dynamics.

## Interests

- Computational materials science
- Anharmonicity of lattice vibrations
- Carrier and energy transport
- Methodology & software development

## Education

- **PhD in Physics**, University of Tokyo, 2013
- **MSc in Physics**, University of Tokyo, 2010
- **BSc in Physics**, Keio University, 2008

## Recent News

::: {#recent-news}
:::

[See all news →](news/index.qmd)

## Contact

- **Email:** TADANO.Terumasa [at] nims.go.jp
- **Address:** 1-2-1 Sengen, Tsukuba, Ibaraki 305-0047, Japan
